name: profile-editor
title: Profile Editor
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Profile editor card with avatar, status indicator, editable name/bio fields, and save/cancel actions. Supports compact (settings) and full (onboarding) layouts.
docs: Pass `displayName`, `status`, and optional `avatarUrl`, `username`, `bio`. Set `editing` to enable editable fields and wire up `onDisplayNameChange`, `onSave`, etc. Use `compact` for inline settings layout.
